revision.comment: Created page with "{{Navbox | name = User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru Faith | title = '''{{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|五十猛神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-kami|en:draft|lt=Isotakeru Faith}}''' | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Itakiso-jinja, haisho.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|五十猛神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-kami|en:draft}} * [[Ōkuninushi|Onamuchi]] |group2 = Head Shrines |list2 = * [[Munakata Taisha]]..."
15 revisions imported: importing my template for usage here
added [[Category:Original pages]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru Faith]] to [[Isotakeru Faith]]
Immanuelle moved page [[Isotakeru Faith]] to [[Template:Isotakeru Faith]]
Adding [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Isotakeru Faith | title = '''{{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|五十猛神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-kami|en:draft|lt=Isotakeru Faith|10=fr|11=Isotakeru-no-kami}}''' | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Itakiso-jinja, haisho.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|五十猛神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-kami|en:draft|lt=Isotakeru-no-kami|10=fr|11=Isotakeru-no-kami}} * [[Ōkuninushi|Onamuchi]] * {{ill|Ame-no-ikutama-no-mikoto|ja|天活玉命}} * {{ill|Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|ja|オオヤツヒメ・ツマツヒメ|zh|大屋津姬命與枛津姬命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime}} |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * {{ill|Itakiso shrine|en}} * {{ill|Takase Shrine|en}} * [[Watatsu Shrine]]
}}<noinclude> [[fr:Modèle:Palette Foi Isotakeru]] [[ja:Template:五十猛神信仰]] {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:Original pages]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] [[en:Template:Isotakeru Faith]] }} </noinclude>

[[sn:Isotakeru Faith]] [[en:Template:Isotakeru Faith]] }}</noinclude>
</noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Isotakeru Faith | title = '''{{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|五十猛神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-kami|en:draft|lt=Isotakeru Faith|10=fr|11=Isotakeru-no-kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}}''' | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Itakiso-jinja, haisho.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|五十猛神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-kami|en:draft|lt=Isotakeru-no-kami|10=fr|11=Isotakeru-no-kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} * [[Ōkuninushi|Onamuchi]] * {{ill|Ame-no-ikutama-no-mikoto|ja|天活玉命|1=Ame-no-Ikutama|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-ikutama-no-mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Ikutama|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-ikutama-no-mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Ikutama|qq=}} * {{ill|Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|ja|オオヤツヒメ・ツマツヒメ|zh|大屋津姬命與枛津姬命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|qq=}} |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * {{ill|Itakiso shrine|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itakiso shrine|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itakiso shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Takase Shrine|en|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takase Shrine|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takase Shrine|qq=}} * [[Watatsu Shrine]]
}}<noinclude> [[fr:Modèle:Palette Foi Isotakeru]] [[ja:Template:五十猛神信仰]] <noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[sn:Isotakeru Faith]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Isotakeru Faith | title = '''{{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|五十猛神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-kami|en:draft|lt=Isotakeru Faith|10=fr|11=Isotakeru-no-kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}}''' | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Itakiso-jinja, haisho.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|五十猛神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-kami|en:draft|lt=Isotakeru-no-kami|10=fr|11=Isotakeru-no-kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} * [[Ōkuninushi|Onamuchi]] * {{ill|Ame-no-ikutama-no-mikoto|ja|天活玉命|1=Ame-no-Ikutama|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-ikutama-no-mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Ikutama|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-ikutama-no-mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Ikutama|qq=}} * {{ill|Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|ja|オオヤツヒメ・ツマツヒメ|zh|大屋津姬命與枛津姬命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|qq=}} |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * {{ill|Itakiso shrine|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itakiso shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itakiso shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Takase Shrine|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takase Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takase Shrine|qq=}} * [[Watatsu Shrine]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Isotakeru Faith | title = '''{{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|五十猛神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-kami|en:draft|WD=Q10881556|lt=Isotakeru Faith|10=fr|11=Isotakeru-no-kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}}''' | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Itakiso-jinja, haisho.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|五十猛神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-kami|en:draft|WD=Q10881556|lt=Isotakeru-no-kami|10=fr|11=Isotakeru-no-kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=}} * [[Ōkuninushi|Onamuchi]] * {{ill|Ame-no-ikutama-no-mikoto|ja|天活玉命|1=Ame-no-Ikutama|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-ikutama-no-mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Ikutama|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-ikutama-no-mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Ikutama|qq=}} * {{ill|Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|ja|オオヤツヒメ・ツマツヒメ|zh|大屋津姬命與枛津姬命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyatsuhime and Tsumatsuhime|qq=}} |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * {{ill|Itakiso shrine|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itakiso shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itakiso shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Takase Shrine|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takase Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takase Shrine|qq=}} * [[Watatsu Shrine]]
}}<noinclude> [[fr:Modèle:Palette Foi Isotakeru]] [[ja:Template:五十猛神信仰]] <noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTIsotakeru Faith]]
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTIsotakeru Faith]] [[en:Template:Isotakeru Faith]] }}</noinclude>
</noinclude><noinclude>[[en:Template:Isotakeru Faith]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
